vocab.example: Through months of training, our basketball squad transformed from a group of individuals into a cohesive unit.

vocab.meaning: thử thách bản lĩnh/lòng can đảm của ai đó
vocab.example: Competing in the city finals really tested my mettle as a goalkeeper under immense pressure.

vocab.meaning: sự phối hợp hành động đồng nhất
vocab.example: In rowing, achieving a perfect unison of action is far more important than the strength of any single athlete.

vocab.meaning: chiến thắng nghịch cảnh/vượt qua khó khăn
vocab.example: Our team’s journey to the championship was a classic story of triumph over adversity after losing our star player to injury.
Our defensive strategy was specifically designed to stifle the opposition’s counter-attacks.

vocab.meaning: bàn đạp/bước đệm cho cái gì đó
vocab.example: Joining the school football team served as a springboard for developing my self-confidence in social situations.
As the team captain, I had to shoulder the responsibility of keeping everyone’s morale high during a losing streak.
Mutual trust among teammates is undoubtedly the bedrock of success in any professional sporting environment.

vocab.meaning: phải ngồi ngoài (thường do chấn thương hoặc quyết định kỹ thuật)
vocab.example: It was devastating to be sidelined by a knee injury right before the most important match of the year.
We spent hours analyzing video footage of our rivals to gain a competitive edge in the upcoming tournament.
